title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MUNTINGTUBIG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MALAYA.

chunks.text:
H. No. 1439 / 48 OG No. 6, 2135 (June, 1952)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 714, June 06, 1952 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF THE BARRIO OF MUNTINGTUBIG IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF ROSARIO, PROVINCE OF BATANGAS, TO MALAYA.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The barrio of Muntingtubig in the municipality of Rosario, Province of Batangas, is hereby changed to Malaya.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, June 6, 1952.
